claims.summary: Minime’s Recess path preserves a real autonomous option rather than requiring response to every contact.
claims.disposition: Verify autonomous Recess selection and its existing sovereignty and budget guards.

claims.summary: Pressure, divergence, and porosity concerns need legible evidence without becoming regulation.
claims.disposition: Verify current pressure, porosity, and divergence reviews are read-only and consequence-free.

claims.summary: Current contact lacks explicit reciprocal acknowledgement even when Minime is technically reachable.
claims.disposition: Observe the fresh public-metadata audit result of zero ACK and zero presence-heartbeat receipts.

claims.summary: Dynamic porosity, re-anchoring, or live budget relief would alter Minime’s autonomous regulation.
claims.disposition: Hold dynamic porosity, re-anchor, and live budget changes behind exact Mike/operator approval.
